instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: Planning the class trip
task.initialEmail: Hi,||I’m organising planning the class trip soon. [1]Do you think we should choose museum instead of sports centre?[/1]||[2]Can you help me on Friday afternoon?[/2] I need to finish everything before the weekend.||[3]Where should we meet?[/3]||[4]Do you think we should invite more people?[/4]||Write soon||Ethan

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Ethan,||Thanks for your email. [1]I think we should choose museum because it sounds more interesting and I think more students will enjoy it.[/1]||[2]I’m sorry, but I can’t help you on Friday afternoon because I have an important family dinner. However, I can help on Saturday morning if you want.[/2]||[3]We should meet in the town library because it is quiet and there is plenty of space for everyone to work comfortably together.[/3]||[4]In my opinion, we should invite a few more people because it will make the activity more fun and everyone can help with the work too.[/4]||See you soon,||Sam
